about.name: Nami Sawada
about.description:
I’m a results-driven web developer who enjoys tackling difficult challenges. While I've worked on both frontend and backend development, I specialise in improving UI/UX and optimising SEO.

Currently, I’m based in Bergen, Norway, working as a marketer at Alt Japansk AS while pursuing a degree in IU International University online.

Previously, I lived in Tokyo and worked as a web developer for different clients, including a fast-paced international startup and large Japanese companies. I worked on SaaS products, B2C web apps, and public websites, focusing on performance, UI/UX improvements, and turning ideas into real products. 

Outside of work, you can find me hiking on the fjords, running outside at dawn, or having a cake and coffee with my friends at a cafe 🍰

skills.heading: Skills
skills.description: I'm comfortable working with a wide range of environments from legacy systems to modern stacks, and can adapt to whatever your team uses. Here are some of the tools and technologies I use.

recent_work.heading: Recent Work
recent_work.description: I have worked on developing not only SaaS systems and B2C apps but also design-focused websites. You can find my full work history and the details in my resume.

altjapansk.title: Marketer
altjapansk.description:
An E-commerce website offering authentic Japanese products.
Contribute to increasing organic traffic and sales through SEO optimization and content management.

southamerica.title: Frontend developer
southamerica.description:
An AI-powered SaaS app for team and project management.
Focused on implementing a highly customisable UI and developing content management features using a headless CMS.

fullstack.title: Fullstack developer
fullstack.description:
A recruiting platform with job search functionality and content to engage users.
Handled both frontend and backend development, including landing pages, SEO optimization, and search functionality.

mimanakiel.title: Web developer
mimanakiel.description:
A clean, minimalist modelling portfolio website.
Worked on both design and development.
Design: Mimana & Nami
Development: Nami
